emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] often has nothing to do with willpower
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you've been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and feel like you've tried everything without lasting results, there's something worth knowing: the conventional approach rarely looks at the underlying biology driving your symptoms.

At Nava Health, we start with 90+ biomarker labs — testing that most standard practices simply don't run. What we find often surprises patients: hormonal imbalances, micronutrient deficiencies, and dysfunction in the adrenal or thyroid axis that have been present for years, silently shaping how you feel every day.

Your [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] is a meaningful signal worth investigating — not something to push through or manage with short-term fixes.

When you're ready to find out what's actually driving your symptoms, we'd be glad to walk you through what a first visit at Nava Health looks like.

Warm regards,
The Nava Health Care Team

emails.subject: Think of your hormones like a symphony orchestra
emails.preview: When one section is off, everything suffers.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's a simple way to think about how hormones affect everything from energy to weight to sleep.

Imagine your body's hormonal system as an orchestra. When every instrument is tuned and playing in rhythm, the music is seamless. But if even one section falls out of sync — say, the thyroid or the adrenal glands — the entire performance suffers, even if individual musicians are technically fine on their own.

Standard care often looks at individual 'musicians' in isolation. Functional medicine, as practiced at Nava Health, listens to the whole symphony. Using 90+ biomarker tests and advanced hormone panels, we identify where the system is out of balance — not just where one number is out of range.

For [FIRST_NAME], the [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] approach may be a meaningful part of restoring that rhythm. Everyone's biology is different, and your care plan reflects that.

Warm regards,
The Nava Health Care Team

emails.subject: How one patient finally got answers after years of 'normal' labs
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

A patient we'll call M.R. came to Nava Health after three years of fatigue, difficulty losing weight, and disrupted sleep — despite being told repeatedly that her labs were 'within normal range.'

When we ran our comprehensive biomarker panel, we found patterns in her hormone and adrenal markers that standard testing had missed. Her care plan included targeted hormone support, nutrient repletion, and dietary adjustments aligned to her specific biology. Within a few months, she described feeling like herself again for the first time in years.

We share her story not to promise the same for everyone — results vary, and everyone's biology is different — but to illustrate what becomes possible when the root cause is actually addressed.

If you're ready to take that step, [BOOKING_LINK] makes it easy to get started.

Warm regards,
The Nava Health Care Team

*Individual results vary. This is not a guarantee of outcomes.*

app_config.tagline: Find the Root Cause. Restore Your Health.

Hormone Imbalance: Unexplained weight gain despite eating well
Mood swings and irritability throughout the day
Hot flashes or night sweats disrupting sleep
Low libido or changes in sexual function
Hair thinning or loss without a clear cause
Persistent fatigue that doesn't improve with rest
Anxiety or depression that feels out of proportion
Fatigue & Energy: Waking up tired even after a full night of sleep
Relying on caffeine to function throughout the day
Feeling exhausted after minimal physical activity
Difficulty staying alert during meetings or conversations
No motivation to do things you used to enjoy
Brain fog that makes it hard to concentrate
Weight Management: Gaining weight even when eating less than before
Inability to lose weight despite exercising regularly
Rapid weight gain after a hysterectomy or hormonal change
Feeling bloated and heavier than the scale shows
Cravings for sweets or salty foods that are hard to control
Low energy making exercise feel impossible
Gut Health: Frequent gas, cramping, or irregular digestion
Food sensitivities that seem to be getting worse
Constipation or diarrhea with no clear cause
Feeling foggy or tired after eating
History of antibiotic use and ongoing digestive issues
Skin breakouts linked to what you eat
Diagnosed or suspected leaky gut or IBS
Thyroid Issues: Unexplained weight gain or difficulty losing weight
Hair loss or dry, brittle hair
Depression or low mood without a clear trigger
Swelling around the neck or throat area
Sleep Problems: Difficulty falling asleep even when tired
Waking up multiple times during the night
Vivid dreams or restless legs disturbing sleep
Night sweats or feeling overheated in bed
Feeling unrefreshed in the morning after sleeping 7-8 hours
Racing thoughts that won't stop at bedtime
Relying on sleep aids or melatonin regularly
Daytime drowsiness affecting work or focus
Brain Fog: Struggling to recall words or names mid-conversation
Difficulty focusing on a task for more than a few minutes
Feeling mentally 'cloudy' most of the day
Making simple mistakes you wouldn't normally make
Feeling overwhelmed by tasks that used to be easy
Short-term memory lapses that are getting more frequent
Sexual Health: Low or absent libido for weeks or months
Difficulty with arousal or physical response
Erectile difficulties or changes in sexual performance
Feeling disconnected from your own body
